Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Mapper, Sealed Result class, Secure storage abstraction
Anti_Patterns: Storing tokens in SharedPreferences, Skipping input validation on amounts, Direct API calls from UI, Mutable global state for auth
Test_Priority: domain layer use cases and repository contracts

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Stream-based repos, Pagination handler, WebSocket manager
Anti_Patterns: Fetching entire feed without pagination, Blocking UI thread with image processing, Polling instead of WebSocket for chat, Storing large media blobs in state
Test_Priority: presentation layer bloc/event handling and stream subscriptions

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Cart aggregate, Price calculator service, Deep link handler
Anti_Patterns: Recalculating cart totals in the UI layer, Not persisting cart to local storage, Coupling payment logic to UI, Hardcoding currency formatting
Test_Priority: domain layer cart and checkout use cases

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Encryption service, Platform health bridge, Offline sync queue
Anti_Patterns: Storing health data unencrypted, Skipping data validation for vitals input, Not handling HealthKit/Health Connect permission denial, Tight coupling to platform health APIs
Test_Priority: data layer encryption and platform integration

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Offline content manager, Progress tracker, Video player abstraction
Anti_Patterns: Downloading all course content at once, Not tracking progress locally before sync, Blocking UI during quiz grading, No resume capability for video playback
Test_Priority: domain layer progress tracking and offline sync logic

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, RBAC guard, Form validator, Audit logger, Multi-tenant resolver
Anti_Patterns: Hardcoding tenant IDs, Checking permissions only in UI, Not logging state transitions for audit, Mixing admin and user flows in same module
Test_Priority: domain layer RBAC and approval workflow use cases

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Media session manager, Cache strategy (LRU), DRM handler, Background playback service
Anti_Patterns: Loading full media files into memory, Not releasing media resources on dispose, Ignoring audio focus/interruption handling, Skipping DRM for preview content
Test_Priority: presentation layer media playback state and background service

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Pagination cursor, Cache invalidation strategy, Deep link router, Read position tracker
Anti_Patterns: Loading all articles at once without pagination, Not caching articles for offline reading, Ignoring deep link state restoration, Blocking render with full HTML parsing
Test_Priority: data layer caching and pagination logic

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, CRDT-based sync, Conflict resolver, Local-first data layer, Background sync worker
Anti_Patterns: Overwriting remote changes without conflict detection, Not supporting offline creation, Syncing entire dataset instead of deltas, Blocking UI during sync resolution
Test_Priority: domain layer conflict resolution and sync use cases

Key_Patterns: Repository pattern, Use case, DI, Map controller abstraction, Currency converter, Offline map tile cache, Booking state machine
Anti_Patterns: Loading full map tile sets on startup, Not caching exchange rates, Tight coupling to Google Maps SDK, Not handling location permission denial gracefully
Test_Priority: data layer booking state machine and map integration
